description_long: This is a modern two-story office building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling glass windows on both levels, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The ground floor has a prominent glass double-door entrance that opens onto a spacious, tiled terrace with a metal railing. The upper floor interior is visible, showing organized office furniture, shelving, and a workspace, while the exterior walls are finished in a clean white and brick pattern. The side and rear facades are mostly solid, with minimal window openings and a single wooden door at the back. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, two-story office building with large glass windows, a spacious front terrace, and a clean white and brick exterior. The design is sleek and functional, with visible office interiors and minimalistic side and rear facades.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows on both floors, a double-door entrance, and a wide terrace with metal railing.
description_view_1: Left side view with a mostly solid white wall, partial terrace visible, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a plain white wall with a single wooden door and upper-level windows.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid wall, partial brick pattern, and a glimpse of the terrace and interior plant.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, full-height rectangular windows spanning the front facade in a continuous band on both floors; minimal or no windows on sides and rear.
